prestazioni: 3.5L EcoBoost (2nd Gen) V6 (Engine Code: **GTDI-3.5L-270HP**) forced induction upgrade with **Garrett GTX4202R Gen II turbochargers** (18 psi peak boost, billet compressor wheel, 62mm inducer) paired with a **PRL Motorsports Catted Downpipe (3.5" diameter, 304 stainless steel)** and **Cobb Tuning Accessport V3** Stage 3+ custom tune (E30-E50 ethanol blend, 550+ whp, 600+ lb-ft torque) with **Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors** and **DW300C+ fuel pump**

Full **VMP Racing 3.5L EcoBoost Stage 3 Long Block** (forged internals: Manley I-beam connecting rods, Mahle Motorsport forged pistons, billet main caps, upgraded head studs) with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head stud kit** and **Ferrea Racing intake/exhaust valves (superfinished stems)**

**KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-Way Coilovers (Ford F-150 Tremor-specific valving)** with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs**, **Whiteline front/rear sway bars (27mm hollow, adjustable end links)**, and **Polyelastics subframe bushings** for chassis rigidity, paired with **Nitto Ridge Grappler 35x12.50R20LT tires** on **Method MR701 VT-Spec wheels (20x10, +18mm offset)**
estetica: **RTR Vehicles Ford F-150 Tremor 'Extreme Off-Road' Widebody Kit** (carbon fiber fender flares, vented hood scoop, rear diffuser) with **PPG Ford 'Iconic Silver' matte wrap (custom 'Tremor' ghost graphics)** and **Rigid Industries E-Series Pro LED light bars (50" front bumper, 30" rear chase bar)**

**Bully Dog GT Platinum Tuner (with custom 'Tremor' display skin)** mounted on a **Tyger Auto TG-DH1F1508 roll-up tonneau cover (hard aluminum, matte black)** with **BedSlide F-150 Tremor-specific sliding bed tray (1000lb capacity, powder-coated red)**

**Ford Performance Tremor 'Black Ops' front grille (mesh delete, gloss black)** paired with **Hella Supertone horns (130dB, chrome finish)** and **B&W Turnover Ball Gooseneck Hitch (30K lb capacity, hidden under rear bumper)** with **custom LED underglow (Oracle Lighting 6500K, switchback turn signals)**
